remaining_main_risk: V3.12.1 is an encoding-clean and wording-stabilized version of V3.12. The three credibility checks in §VIII.D remain non-gold robustness analyses: (A) Evidence Necessity uses a pre-existing NLI audit on an earlier dataset version; (B) Screening Utility counts depend on silver labels; (C) Label-Shift is a simulated sensitivity probe, and at 50% retention the Δ 95% CI crosses zero. Independent gold adjudication (§VII) is still the only mechanism that can validate absolute numbers, resolve the mild/strong boundary κ, and confirm the strong_action retention rate. The wording change from 'systematically' to 'consistently' does not weaken the strong_action under-detection main conclusion — the numbers (LLM strong-F1=0.0769, recall=0.04) are unchanged.
recommended_next_action: Send V3.12.1 to advisor as the current best silver-stage draft. Frame as: 'encoding-clean and wording-stabilized version with three non-gold credibility checks (§VIII.D) that strengthen the silver-stage relative pattern (R4 > LLM on strong_action) without replacing gold adjudication.' The label-shift break-even (~50% retention) sets a pre-registered quantitative bar for the gold pilot. Proceed to 50-sample gold pilot per §VII protocol. Do NOT claim gold validation in any external communication.
